title: No Taxpayer Funding for the U.N. Population Fund
short_title: No Taxpayer Funding for the U.N. Population Fund
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
crs_summary: No Taxpayer Funding for the U.N. Population Fund Act This bill prohibits the use of funds to provide contributions directly or indirectly to the United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA). The UNFPA is the United Nations sexual and reproductive health agency.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
